title: 8A Dystopias and Utopias — Дистопии и утопии

items.example: The novel describes a utopia where everyone lives in perfect harmony.
Many modern films portray a dystopia where technology controls people's lives.
A fair society should provide equal opportunities for all its citizens.
The village looked idyllic with its charming cottages and green hills.
The film's depiction of a post-apocalyptic world was deeply depressing.
The government in the novel is oppressive, controlling every aspect of life.
We should aspire to create a world where everyone has access to education.
The characters struggle against an unjust system throughout the story.
The author's vision of the future is both terrifying and thought-provoking.
